name: Chuck Wagon Salisbury Steak
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure and crush 1 cup of Kellogg's Cornflakes.
2. Place the crushed cereal in a mixing bowl.
3. Add the egg, 1/3 cup barbecue sauce, salt, and pepper to the cereal.
4. Beat all ingredients together well.
5. Gradually add the lean ground beef, mixing only until combined.
6. Shape the mixture into four oval patties about 3/4 inch thick.
7. Brush the patties with the remaining barbecue sauce.
8. Bake at 375°F for about 25 minutes for medium doneness. Adjust baking time as desired.
